creator: aline@riseup.net
text:
Hi,

I have the same issue as in the kern/115614. The only difference is that I'm 
using a blank CD-R as media (I didn't test it with DVD media).

The point is, I'm able to burn cd's through the atapicam device only as root. 
The issue happens when I try to burn it as a normal user. 

Release: 
FreeBSD anderson-herzer.suite 7.0-RC2 FreeBSD 7.0-RC2 #2: Sun Feb 17 13:35:43 
BRT 2008     root@anderson-herzer.suite:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ANDERSON  i386
